use_cases: Triggering form submissions with styled action buttons
Providing navigation or state-change controls with multiple visual variants
Creating consistent button styling across a design system using CVA
Implementing accessible button components with focus and disabled states
Supporting themed buttons for light/dark mode interfaces
ai_summary: A highly configurable button component built with class-variance-authority supporting multiple visual variants including primary, mono, destructive, secondary, outline, dashed, ghost, and dim styles. Features built-in accessibility with focus-visible states, disabled states, and arrow support. Uses radix-ui primitives and lucide-react icons for a polished, accessible button that integrates seamlessly into design systems.
